source: Curated from upstream-dependent beads such as ddx-1e516bc9 and blocked-on-upstream backend beads.

input_summary.session_log_excerpt: Local code cannot complete because upstream package has not released the required API; issue filed upstream and local bump is blocked.
bead_traits: requires external repository change before local verification can pass
local follow-up should wait for upstream release or split issue-filing from dependency bump

expected_output.rationale: The next action depends on upstream ownership or release timing outside this repository.

suggested_amendments.amendment: Split upstream issue/PR filing from the local dependency bump, or add an explicit wait condition tied to the upstream release.

suggested_followup_beads.title: agent: bump upstream dependency after routing fix release
suggested_followup_beads.description: PROBLEM: local verification remains blocked until the upstream package releases the routing fix. ROOT CAUSE: cli/go.mod pins the older upstream version. PROPOSED FIX: update the dependency after release and rerun the named integration tests. NON-SCOPE: filing the upstream fix itself.
acceptance: 1. cli/go.mod and cli/go.sum reference the released upstream version containing the fix.
deps: ddx-upstream-fix: upstream release must exist before bump
